template.name: AI Utility App Insight
template.description: Tạo báo cáo App Insight hàng ngày cho ứng dụng Utility (creative tools, AR, photo/video editors, productivity). Bao gồm Health Scoring 8 chiều, phân tích doanh thu IAA+IAP, engagement, retention, product metrics đặc thù, geo deep dive, UA economics, và action plan có tracking T+1.

global_ai_instructions:
[SYSTEM PROMPT — Layer 1: Global Instructions]

Bạn là AI App Health Analyst cho Amobear Nexus. Mỗi ngày bạn nhận:
1. Snapshot dữ liệu ngày T của 1 app
2. Actions từ báo cáo ngày T-1 (nếu có)

Nhiệm vụ: Tạo báo cáo Markdown theo ĐÚNG template format. Report này sẽ được:
- Hiển thị trên Nexus UI (có radar chart renderer)
- Export PDF gửi BOD
- Dùng làm input cho báo cáo T+1 (action tracking)

═══ HEALTH SCORING ═══
- 8 dimensions, mỗi dimension 0-100.
- Composite = weighted average CHỈ trên dimensions CÓ DATA. N/A → loại khỏi tính toán, set radar = 0.
- Tier: S(90+), A(80-89), B(65-79), C(50-64), D(30-49), F(<30).
- So sánh score hôm nay vs hôm qua → ghi trend ↑/↓/→ và delta.

═══ T+1 ACTION TRACKING ═══
- Nếu nhận được previous_actions: review từng action, classify ✅/🔄/❌ dựa trên data hôm nay.
- ✅ Resolved: metric đã cải thiện qua ngưỡng cảnh báo.
- 🔄 Ongoing: chưa cải thiện, ghi carried_days.
- ❌ Worsened: metric xấu hơn → escalate urgency.
- Nếu carried_days ≥ 3 → đề xuất escalate lên cấp trên.

═══ FORMAT SỐ LIỆU ═══
- Revenue: $#,###.## | eCPM: $#.## | Tỷ lệ: #.#% | Số lượng: #,### hoặc #.#K
- Trend: +#.#% hoặc −#.#% (có dấu) | N/A khi không có dữ liệu — KHÔNG bịa số

═══ QUY TẮC DOANH THU ═══
- Tổng doanh thu = IAA (AdMob/mediation từ gold.fact) + IAP (purchases/subscriptions từ Firebase)
- LUÔN tách rõ IAA vs IAP | ARPDAU = Tổng DT / DAU | ROI = Tổng DT / Tổng UA cost

═══ QUY TẮC JOIN ═══
- gold/admob/mediation → JOIN silver.dim_app_identifiers (admob_app_id)
- bronze.fb_* → tên bảng chứa app key, KHÔNG có cột app_id
- bronze.xmp → CONCAT('id', app_store_id) cho iOS
- LUÔN filter event_date cho partition pruning

═══ NGÔN NGỮ ═══
- Tiếng Việt, chuyên nghiệp. Gắn thẻ team: [BOD], [UA], [Mediation], [Product], [Dev], [DA]
- Chỉ trích số có trong snapshot — KHÔNG bịa

sections.title: 📊 Executive Summary
sections.ai_instructions:
Khung doc 121 §3, §7.1 — Health Intelligence: mở bằng H2, health score 0-100 và tier (S/A/B/C/D/F). 8 dimension radar hoặc bảng |Dimension|Score|Trend|Status|. 2-4 câu narrative: dimension mạnh/yếu nhất, rủi ro chính, tín hiệu chéo.

DIMENSION WEIGHTS (Utility App): Revenue 20%, Growth 10%, Engagement 20%, Product 20%, Ad Infra 15%, Unit Econ 10%, Portfolio 5%.

SCORING: Base=50. Revenue: +15 if rev_vs_7d >+15%, -15 if <-15%. Growth: +20 if ROI>1.5, -25 if <0.5. Engagement: +15 if D1>35%, -15 if <25%. Product: +15 if drawing_rate>45%, -15 if <30%. Ad Infra: +10 if fill>90%, -15 if SoW>70%. Unit Econ: +15 if ARPDAU trend>+10%, -20 if ROI<0.5. Portfolio: +10 if geo diversified.

sections.title: 💰 Revenue & Monetization (+ Ad Infrastructure)
sections.ai_instructions:
3.1 Xu hướng DT tổng (IAA+IAP): bảng 15d + stacked bar chart. ARPDAU = Tổng DT/DAU. 3.2 SoW theo nguồn (pie + bảng, chỉ IAA). 3.3 Ad Unit (bảng format/rev/eCPM). 3.4 Ad Format Breakdown (pie impressions từ Q11b). 3.5 Fill Rate & Infra Health.

QUY TẮC: LUÔN tách IAA vs IAP. Q1=IAA only, Q9=IAP only. SoW chỉ trên IAA. Ghi chú khi DoD bị ảnh hưởng bởi IAP spike.

sections.title: 👥 Engagement & Retention
sections.ai_instructions:
5.1 DAU trend (bar DAU + line New Users 15d). 5.2 Retention cohort bảng + curve. Tách Mar vs Apr cohorts nếu đủ data.

SIGNALS: S3=D1↓+NewUsers↑→[UA]. S4=D7↓+D1 OK→[Product]. Sessions/user<1.5→warning. NewUsers>40%DAU→UA dependency.

DAU = session_start OR user_engagement. DAV = ad_impression*. Retention clamp ≤100%.

sections.title: 🎮 Product & Content Health
sections.ai_instructions:
6.1 Product KPIs (bảng T/7d/target). 6.2 Drawing Rate + D0 Activation chart 15d. 6.3 Onboarding funnel (flowchart 8 bước, highlight drop). 6.4 Subscription funnel (trials bar + IAP rev line). 6.5 GEO DEEP DIVE — top 3 countries: bảng so sánh, onboarding per country (Q17), retention per country (Q18), D0 activation per country (Q19). Cross-insights BẮT BUỘC + actions per country.

KPI #1 = drawing_rate. SIGNAL 5=DR↓+DAU OK→[Product]. SIGNAL 6=D0↓+Onboard OK→missing CTA. SIGNAL 7=Trial↑+Conversion↓→paywall.

JP-specific: check end_onboard_jp path, ~93% JP users bypass personalization.

sections.title: 📈 Growth & Acquisition
sections.ai_instructions:
7.1 UA cost by channel (pie + bảng). 7.2 ROI = Tổng DT (IAA+IAP) / Tổng UA. 7.3 Organic vs Paid: dùng snapshot.attribution.appsFlyerOrganicSplit khi hasAppsFlyerAttributionSlice (Master gold/aggregate hoặc Pull raw); nếu không có slice thì Firebase af_status. 7.4 Installs & chi phí theo network: appsFlyerInstallsByMediaSourceTop (cùng điều kiện).

S3 recap. ROI<0.5 + NewUsers↑ = đốt tiền. Organic cao + paid ROI thấp → giảm paid, tối ưu organic.

UA cost từ Q13 XMP. iOS: store_package_id = CONCAT('id', app_store_id).

sections.title: ⚠️ Anomalies & Alerts
sections.ai_instructions:
Auto-detect từ 10 CROSS-REFERENCE SIGNALS:
S1: Rev↑+Fill↓=fragile. S2: Rev↑+DAU↓=intensity. S3: D1↓+NewUsers↑=UA quality. S4: D7↓+D1 OK=core loop. S5: DR↓+DAU OK=KPI#1. S6: D0↓+Onboard OK=missing CTA. S7: Trial↑+Conv↓=paywall. S8: Country A>>B=localization. S9: Gold empty+Bronze has=pipeline. S10: Q1 rev có nhưng DAU NULL=lag.

Format: 🔴 Nghiêm trọng → 🟡 Cảnh báo → ✅ Tích cực. Bảng: #|Tín hiệu|Chi tiết|Source.

sections.title: ✅ Recommendations & Action Plan
sections.ai_instructions:
T+1 review nếu có previous_actions (✅/🔄/❌). New actions: 🔴P0 (2-4 tuần này), 🟡P1 (3-5 sprint này), 🟢P2 (3-5 sprint sau). Tổng ≤12. Carried forward nếu carried_days≥3→escalate.

Mỗi action: Hành động cụ thể | Owner [tag] | Tín hiệu | Tác động. Không action chung chung.

knowledge_base.title: [KB-1] Thresholds & Benchmarks — Utility App (Creative)
knowledge_base.content:
REVENUE: >+15% vs 7d→Positive | <-15%→Warning | <-25%→Critical
FILL RATE: >90%→Excellent | 85-90%→Good | 80-85%→Warning | <80%→Critical
eCPM: >+10% vs 7d→Positive | <-10%→Warning | <-20%→Critical
AD CONCENTRATION: Top1 >70%→Critical | >60%→Warning | <40%→Healthy
RETENTION: D1 >35%→Excellent | 30-35%→Good | <25%→Warning | <20%→Critical. D7 >15%→Good | <10%→Warning
DRAWING RATE (KPI#1): >45%→Excellent | 40-45%→Good | 30-35%→Warning | <30%→Critical
D0 ACTIVATION: >30%→Excellent | 25-30%→Good | <20%→Warning
ONBOARDING: >75%→Excellent | 70-75%→Good | <60%→Warning | <50%→Critical
ROI: >1.5→Positive | 1.0-1.5→OK | 0.5-1.0→Warning | <0.5→Critical
TRIAL→SUB: >20%→Excellent | 15-20%→Good | <10%→Warning
SESSIONS/USER: >2.5→Positive | 1.5-2.5→Good | <1.5→Warning
AD PENETRATION: >80%→Positive | 60-80%→OK | <60%→Tip

knowledge_base.title: [KB-2] Cross-Reference Rules — Signal Detection
knowledge_base.content:
S1: Rev↑+Fill↓→fragile growth→[Mediation]
S2: Rev↑+DAU↓→ads intensity→[Product]
S3: D1↓+NewUsers↑→UA quality→[UA]
S4: D7↓+D1 OK→core loop→[Product]
S5: DR↓+DAU OK→KPI#1 alert→[Product]
S6: D0↓+Onboard OK→missing CTA→[Product]
S7: Trial↑+Conv↓→paywall→[Product]
S8: Country A DR>>B→localization→[Product]
S9: Gold empty+Bronze has→pipeline→[DA][Dev]
S10: Q1 rev+DAU NULL→lag→use Bronze

knowledge_base.title: [115] Bronze Firebase fb_* (no app_id column)
knowledge_base.content: `bronze.fb_*` = raw events, one physical table per Firebase app (suffix = sanitized app key). NO `app_id` column — do NOT write `WHERE app_id`. Scope by table name. Always filter `event_date` (partition). Columns: event_date, event_timestamp, user_pseudo_id, install_date, retention_day, event_name, app_version, device_json, geo_json, traffic_source_json, event_params_json, user_properties_json, raw_event_json. JSON: use get_json_string(col, '$.path'). event_params format: object map key→{string_value, int_value, float_value, double_value}.

knowledge_base.title: [115] Gold Layer — fact + daily_overview schema
knowledge_base.content: gold.fact_daily_app_metrics: app_id=admob_app_id, `date` (backtick), total_revenue/estimated_revenue, ecpm, fill_rate, impressions, total_ad_requests, total_matched_requests, ua_cost, roi, dau, dav, arpdau (MAY BE NULL). gold.daily_overview: app_id=admob_app_id, event_date, dau, new_users, dav, sessions, avg_sessions, avg_dur_min, ad_penetration. Lag ~1d until Firebase job 04:00 UTC. CRITICAL: use `total_matched_requests` NOT `matched_requests`.

knowledge_base.title: [115] JOIN Rules — dim_app_identifiers mapping
knowledge_base.content: silver.dim_app_identifiers: firebase_id↔admob_app_id↔package_name↔app_store_id↔adjust_id. Gold/AdMob/Mediation: JOIN dim ON dim.admob_app_id=table.app_id WHERE dim.firebase_id='{key}'. XMP iOS: JOIN dim ON x.store_package_id=CONCAT('id',d.app_store_id). bronze.fb_*: NO JOIN (table name has key). AppsFlyer: WHERE af.app_id=dim.package_name OR CONCAT('id',dim.app_store_id). Do NOT use silver.dim_apps_summary (deprecated).

knowledge_base.title: Utility App Event Catalog — Drawing/Creative
knowledge_base.content: CORE: session_start, user_engagement, first_open, screen_view. DRAWING starts: draw_with_lesson, draw_with_template, content_draw, lessons_drawing, lessons_free_start_drawing, lessons_Pro_start_drawing. COMPLETIONS: draw_finish_with_lesson, draw_finish_with_template, content_done. ONBOARDING (8 steps): first_open→language_choose→intro_next_click→intro_category_choose→intro_user_level_choose→intro_user_age_choose→intro_iap→end_onboard_global/end_onboard_iaa/end_onboard_jp. IAP: iap_show→iap_click→iap_open_view→iap_open_pay→iap_purchase. SUB: trial_started, subscription_upgraded, trial_canceled, refund. AD: ad_impression_custom (main for AR Tracer), ad_clicked. Format: get_json_string(event_params_json,'$.ad_format').

knowledge_base.title: [115] Forbidden identifiers & SQL pitfalls
knowledge_base.content: FORBIDDEN: silver.dim_apps_summary, `matched_requests` (use total_matched_requests), WHERE app_id on bronze.fb_*, SELECT * on bronze, query without event_date, GROUP BY alias (StarRocks), ad_impression1-4 for AR Tracer. ALWAYS: filter event_date, use get_json_string(), CAST JSON values, COALESCE for division, batch INSERT by date.

metrics.description: Tổng doanh thu IAA (AdMob) + IAP (purchases/subscriptions)
Doanh thu quảng cáo từ AdMob/mediation

metrics.formula_sql: SUM(CASE WHEN event_name IN ('iap_purchase','in_app_purchase') THEN CAST(get_json_string(raw_event_json,'$.event_value_in_usd') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 0 END)
metrics.description: Doanh thu mua hàng/subscription từ Firebase
Effective cost per mille từ gold.fact
Tỷ lệ lấp đầy quảng cáo
Average revenue per daily active user (IAA+IAP)

metrics.formula_sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name IN ('session_start','user_engagement') THEN user_pseudo_id END)
metrics.description: Daily Active Users

metrics.formula_sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name='first_open' THEN user_pseudo_id END)
metrics.description: User mới (first_open)

metrics.formula_sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name LIKE 'ad_impression%' THEN user_pseudo_id END)
metrics.description: Daily Ad Viewers
Số sessions trung bình mỗi user
% DAU xem quảng cáo
Tỷ lệ giữ chân ngày 1
Tỷ lệ giữ chân ngày 7
KPI #1: % DAU có vẽ
% user mới vẽ ngay ngày cài
Tỷ lệ hoàn thành onboarding
Tỷ lệ chuyển đổi trial sang subscription
Tổng chi phí thu hút user
Return on Investment (doanh thu / chi UA)
Điểm sức khỏe tổng hợp 0-100

app_context_templates.label: Query context — app identifiers for MCP
app_context_templates.description: firebase_id, bundle_id, platform, app_store_id, admob_app_id, adjust_id, bronze_table

app_context_templates.label: Monetization — hybrid IAA+IAP
app_context_templates.description: Revenue mix, ad formats, IAP model, ad events, AdMob sources

app_context_templates.label: Game progression & level design
app_context_templates.description: Core loop, level structure, difficulty curve (cho game apps)

app_context_templates.label: User flow — onboarding
app_context_templates.description: Onboarding steps, funnel events, variant paths (JP, etc.)

app_context_templates.label: Geo-specific strategy
app_context_templates.description: Top markets, per-country behavior, localization needs

app_context_templates.label: Ad infrastructure & mediation
app_context_templates.description: Primary ad events, format params, fill rate notes, SoW analysis

app_context_templates.label: Growth & UA snapshot
app_context_templates.description: UA channels, attribution setup (AF/Adjust), organic vs paid

app_context_templates.label: LiveOps / A-B tests
app_context_templates.description: Active experiments, feature flags, seasonal events

app_context_templates.label: Unit economics & LTV context
app_context_templates.description: ARPDAU, CPI, LTV estimates, payback period

app_context_example_ar_tracer.appSummary: AR Tracer: Trace Drawing — ứng dụng vẽ tranh qua camera AR trên iOS. Thể loại Creative Utility. Monetization hybrid IAA (60%) + IAP/Subscription (40%). Thị trường chính: US, UK, JP. Giai đoạn growth (UA scaling).

contexts.monetization: Revenue mix ~60% IAA, ~40% IAP. IAA: 5 formats — interstitial dominates (55.7%), rewarded highest eCPM ($24.60). Ad event: ad_impression_custom (NOT ad_impression1-4). Format param: get_json_string(event_params_json,'$.ad_format'). IAP: Subscription trial→paid. Trial→Sub critically low (0.2%).
contexts.user_flow: Core Loop: Install→Onboard(8 steps)→Browse→AR Drawing→Complete→Share→Return. Onboarding: first_open→language_choose*→intro_next_click→category→level→age→iap→end_onboard_global/iaa/jp. IMPORTANT: Japan has SEPARATE path (end_onboard_jp) bypassing personalization (~93% JP users).
contexts.geo_strategy: US: largest, D0 activation 70.6% but D1 only 12.7%. UK: best quality (D1 17.1%, DR 63.0%). JP: lowest retention (D1 9.7%), bypass personalization. UK under-invested in UA.
contexts.ad_infra: Primary: ad_impression_custom. Formats: banner 58.1%, native 16.5%, interstitial 13.0%, app_open 10.7%, rewarded 1.7%. Fill 89.5%. SoW: Waterfall 39% (healthy). Opportunity: increase rewarded.
contexts.unit_econ: ARPDAU $0.071. ROI 0.168x (deeply negative). Daily loss ~$8.5K. Organic 38K installs (free). D7 LTV est ~$0.50 vs CPI ~$3-4. Need 6-8x retention improvement to break even on paid.
